emails.subject: Re: Enron: ISDA Schedules
emails.body: Thanks John for the comments. That leaves it up to legal to answer Susan's question. Carol, any thoughts? Jane McBride Senior Legal Counsel Enron Japan Corp. Tel.: 81-3-5219-4500 (Main) 81-3-5219-4553 (Direct) Fax: 81-3-5219-4510 Assistant (Maggy Yamanishi) Tel.: 81-3-5219-4554 Email: Yo.Yamanishi@enron.com John Suttle@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT Sent by: John Suttle@ENRON_DEVELOPMENT 2001/02/26 09:16

emails.subject: Re: Enron: ISDA Schedules
emails.body: Jane Not to back-pass the issue, I think this is generally a Legal question. From the Credit perspective, our concern is Enron's ability
